welcome.subject: Welcome to our platform!
welcome.heading: Welcome { userName }!
welcome.body: We are delighted to welcome you to our platform. Your account has been successfully created and you can now enjoy all our features.
welcome.helper: You can sign in at any time using the email you registered with.
welcome.footer: If you did not create this account, you can safely ignore this email.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password
password_reset.heading: Password reset
password_reset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your account. Click the button below to set a new password.
password_reset.expires: This link will expire in { expiresIn }.
password_reset.footer: If you did not request this reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.

organization_invitation.subject: { inviterName } invites you to join { organizationName }
organization_invitation.preview: { inviterName } invites you to join { organizationName }
organization_invitation.heading: You are invited!
organization_invitation.body: { inviterName } invites you to join the organization { organizationName } as { roleLabel }.
organization_invitation.expires: This invitation is valid until { expiresAt }. If you do not accept it before that date, it will expire automatically.
organization_invitation.footer: If you were not expecting this invitation or believe it was sent in error, you can safely ignore this email.
